text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days before tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the weekend. I'm walking along the riverbank when I see Eishin
Flash training.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Break time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's training fairly intensely. It's clear from her strained
expression that she's fatigued.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Break time... over.
choice_data_list: (That was fast!)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huff... Next is—
choice_data_list: You should really take a longer break!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Who are you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After introducing myself as an academy trainer, I point out that she
obviously needs more rest, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, I... I'm just fine. The short break times are accounted for in my
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's 3 p.m., and my fatigue is at predicted levels. I plan to catch my
breath during the thirty-minute break coming up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like her absolute confidence in her schedule won't allow her
to stray from it. But I wonder...
choice_data_list:
Let's say something unplanned for happens.
What then?

Let's say something unplanned for happens.
What then?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I have included a certain amount of buffer time. For
example, your talking to me has caused a delay of four minutes and
twenty-five seconds.
choice_data_list: Ah... Sorry about that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, it's all right. If I scratch my next five-minute break, I'll be back on
schedule.
choice_data_list: You're gonna get rid of a break?!
You're gonna get rid of a break?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's pushing my limits, I am aware. As I have an immediate goal to
accomplish, my current schedule is tighter than usual.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And following it perfectly is my top priority. If I don't, I...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...It's been five minutes and forty-five seconds. I can't afford to lose
any more time, so please excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I forgot to say—I appreciate you showing concern for me. I'll be going
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is determined to win her race, no question. However, it's
apparent she's so determined that it's stressing her out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tryouts are important, sure, but they're held throughout the year.
Could there be some reason why she has to debut now?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Why, hello there. ☆ Have time for a quick chat?
choice_data_list: Oh! Uh, hey.
Oh! Uh, hey.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Flash is my roommate, you see. So I know all about just how hard she's
been training.
choice_data_list: Would you happen to know why as well?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Of course! But keep all this off the record, mkay?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So for the upcoming tryouts, her parents are apparently coming all
the way from Germany to watch!
choice_data_list: Her parents?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Her family runs, like, a popular cake shop, right? So they're taking
time out of their super busy schedule to visit—that's why Flash is
trying so hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, that certainly answers why she's going all out for this race. But
even so, being so strict about her schedule isn't the only way to
improve.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: At any rate, that's just about all I can say.
choice_data_list: Can I ask why you told me?
Can I ask why you told me?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Mmm, my Falco senses were just telling me I should. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
When I saw the two of you talking, I got this feeling—maybe you'd be
able to understand how amazing she is. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're curious about Flash, aren't you? Make sure you keep your eyes
on her. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's now the day before tryouts, and I'm mulling over what exactly
Smart Falcon meant as I walk across campus.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Toi, toi, toi...
choice_data_list: (What's that sound? And that voice, is that...)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah... We met the other day.
choice_data_list: Were you making a noise just now?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It's this German good luck charm my parents taught me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You tap your desk three times while chanting, "Toi, toi, toi." The
noise wards off evil and brings good luck, supposedly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I know it probably doesn't actually do anything, but I want to make
sure everything goes according to plan tomorrow.
choice_data_list: Something got you worried?
Something got you worried?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, not exactly. It's just... my busy parents have made time to come
watch my race tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have to perform my job properly and achieve perfect results—it's my
duty, as their daughter.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If something goes awry, and my results are... lacking, they won't have
much to be proud of.
choice_data_list: I don't know about that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't pretend to know much about her, much less her parents, but
just seeing her run is enough to know how much effort she's put into
this.
choice_data_list: Your hard work is something to be proud of.
Your hard work is something to be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That... No, that's wrong. It makes light of discipline and
reason—nothing but empty flattery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've just noticed that something's off with her. She's short of breath,
and rather pale...
choice_data_list: Are you feeling all right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My schedule may have pushed me a little past my limits, but I did all I
needed to improve.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Slight discomfort like this is within my margin of error. Besides, today
is a rest day. I'll be fully recovered by tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no power in her voice, much less conviction. I can't imagine
her bouncing back so soon.
choice_data_list:
Might want to consider taking tomorrow off
too...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No, absolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have no plans to take tomorrow off. I've worked hard to win my
race—to achieve the perfect results!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can't deviate from my schedule now—I do things as planned until
they're finished. Or else... or... else...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud.
choice_data_list: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Everything will be... thrown off...
